problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Combining Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
